title: ChainSwap - Swap Across Any Blockchain
seoTitle: ChainSwap - Swap Across Any Blockchain - Free Crypto Website Template | Multiverse
prompt: Build a premium crypto website inspired by ChainSwap - Swap Across Any Blockchain. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.

Questions

ChainSwap uses a combination of bridge protocols and liquidity pools across chains. Your tokens are securely transferred and swapped in atomic transactions.
Base swap fee: 0.25%. Gas costs depend on blockchain - Polygon ~$0.01, Solana ~$0.0005, Ethereum varies. We refund fees for swaps over $10K.
Fully non-custodial with audited smart contracts. We've undergone 3 security audits. All transactions are on-chain and verifiable.

Start Swapping Across Chains

Lowest fees, fastest execution, best rates
